# Save hours of tedious work: Get Our WP Maintenance Service (10% OFF)

- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Do you want to ensure your website runs smoothly during the
holiday season?

Ever wished you could get a dedicated account manager for your
site?

Then now is the right time to get our WordPress maintenance
service.

This Black Friday, we’re offering a massive discount on all our
services for a limited time.

With our WordPress maintenance service, you can rest assured that
someone you can trust will help you resolve any WordPress issues
or concerns.

The best part… we’re offering a huge discount on all our services
for a limited time.

👉 Get 10% OFF on WordPress Maintenance & Expert Tech Support 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.MsAMxgaf91yN6K8IxQNxuSd5jSPnNMFAk2abMYLDDIQ )
👈

Here's what you'll get with our WordPress maintenance service:

- Peace of mind: We’ll manage all the technical details, like
WordPress updates, backups, security monitoring, uptime
monitoring, and more…

- On-demand dev hours: Do you have website issues that you can’t
fix? Our WordPress experts can handle them with our on-demand dev
hours.

- Spend time where it matters: Free yourself from the worries of
running a website. Just focus on your core business and spend
time where it matters.

But you’d better act fast. This limited-time sale expires on 29th
Nov 2024.

All you have to do is copy this coupon code during checkout:
24BFCM

👉 Get WPBeginner WordPress Maintenance Package and Save 10%
